mapper.select: select -- 전체 회원 수 (select count(*) from member_tbl1) as totalMember, -- 이번달 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = trunc(sysdate, 'MM') then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as thisMonthMember, -- 지난달 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), -1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as lastMonthMember, -- 오늘 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as todayMember, -- 어제 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate - 1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as yesterdayMember, -- 신고 카테고리별 건수 (select count(case when report_category = '스팸/광고' then 1 end) from report_tbl) as spam, (select count(case when report_category = '욕설/비방' then 1 end) from report_tbl) as hate, (select count(case when report_category = '부적절한 게시글' then 1 end) from report_tbl) as inappropriateBoard, (select count(case when report_category = '부적절한 댓글' then 1 end) from report_tbl) as inappropriateComment, (select count(case when report_category = '허위정보' then 1 end) from report_tbl) as falseInfo, (select count(case when report_category = '기타' then 1 end) from report_tbl) as etc, -- 미처리 신고 (status = 0) (select count(*) from report_tbl where report_status = 0) as pendingReport, -- 주간 가입자 추이 (4주 전부터 1주 전까지) (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -28 and enroll_date < sysdate - 21) as fourWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -21 and enroll_date < sysdate - 14) as threeWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -14 and enroll_date < sysdate - 7) as twoWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -7) as oneWeekAgo from dual
mapper.insert: insert into notice_tbl values ( notice_seq.nextval, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, sysdate, 0, #{noticePublic}, #{noticeFixed}, #{noticeCategory}, #{noticeImagePath} )
mapper.select: select notice_no, notice_public, notice_fixed, notice_title, notice_content, notice_date, notice_category, notice_image_path from notice_tbl order by notice_fixed desc, notice_date desc
mapper.update: update notice_tbl set notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_public = #{noticePublic}, notice_fixed = #{noticeFixed}, notice_category = #{noticeCategory}, notice_image_path = #{noticeImagePath} where notice_no = #{noticeNo}
mapper.select: select faq_no, faq_title, faq_content, faq_category from faq_tbl

select qna_no, member_id, qna_title, qna_content, qna_status, qna_date, qna_category, qna_question_image from qna_tbl order by qna_status asc, qna_date desc OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: update qna_tbl set qna_answer = #{qnaAnswer}, qna_answer_image = #{qnaAnswerImage}, qna_status = 1 where qna_no = #{qnaNo}
mapper.select: select board_comment_no as commentNo, board_comment_content as content, to_char(board_comment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt, board_no as boardNo from board_comment_tbl where board_comment_writer = #{memberId}

select count(case when log_action = '로그인실패' then 1 end) as "failCount", count(case when log_alert = '위치변경' then 1 end) as "locationChangeCount" from member_log_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} and log_time >= sysdate - 1
mapper.update: update member_tbl1 set lock_until = null, member_status = 0 where member_id = #{targetId}
mapper.insert: insert into admin_log_tbl ( log_no, admin_id, log_target_id, log_result, log_date, log_action, log_reason ) values ( admin_log_seq.nextval, #{memberId}, #{targetId}, '회원 정지 해제', sysdate, #{logAction}, #{reason} )
mapper.select:
select * from ( select b.board_no, b.writer_id, b.board_title, b.board_content, to_char(b.board_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as boardDate, b.board_status, (select listagg(k.keyword, ', ') from keyword_tbl k where b.board_title like '%' || k.keyword || '%' or b.board_content like '%' || k.keyword || '%') as detectedKeyword, (select count(*) from report_tbl r where r.target_no = b.board_no and r.target_type = 'board') as reportCount from board_tbl b ) v
and detectedKeyword is not null
and detectedKeyword is null
and writer_id = #{memberId}
and detectedKeyword is not null and reportCount > 0
and (detectedKeyword is not null or reportCount > 0)
and detectedKeyword is null and reportCount = 0
order by
reportCount asc,
reportCount desc,
boardDate asc
boardDate desc
mapper.insert: insert into admin_log_tbl( log_no, admin_id, log_target_id, log_result, log_date, log_action, log_reason, report_no ) select admin_log_seq.nextval, #{memberId}, #{targetId}, case when r.target_type = 'comment' then '댓글: ' || #{commentAction} || ' / 회원: ' || #{memberAction} else '게시글: ' || #{boardAction} || ' / 회원: ' || #{memberAction} end, sysdate, #{logAction}, #{reason}, r.report_no from report_tbl r where r.target_no = #{targetNo} and r.target_type = #{targetType}
mapper.select:
select * from admin_log_tbl
(admin_id like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or log_target_id like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or log_reason like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or to_char(report_no) like '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
and log_action = #{action}
order by log_date
asc desc
select member_log_no, member_id, log_ip, log_time, log_action, log_detail, log_device, log_location, log_result, log_alert from member_log_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} order by log_time desc
